text:
was a member of the Scout Regiment and the first known person to be killed by a Titan at the start of the series. He appeared to show little emotion and was a conditioned soldier.

Appearance

Moses had unkempt, cheek length, blond hair, and light-green eyes. He was well built and wore the typical uniform of a member of the Scout Regiment along with the common green cloak.

Personality

Moses appeared to be a courageous man, as he did not hesitate to engage Titans encountered on expeditions. He also appeared to possess a sense of bravado, declaring during battles that he would teach the Titans "the power of humanity."

Story

The Fall of Shiganshina arc

During a mission with the Scout Regiment, Moses' squad begins to take formation around a Titan via horses in order to kill it. He switches to omni-directional mobility gear with his teammates, and attempts to kill the targeted Titan.

When the Scout Regiment returns to the Shiganshina District after their failed expedition, his mother asks for him and Commander Keith Sadies gives her his arm; all that remains of him.

Trivia

is a biblical prophet, famous for his participation in the and the creation of the . In the story of the Twelve Spies, he sends one man from each of the twelve tribes of Israel to explore Canaan, and at their return, they describe the land as being inhabited by giants and surrounded by large Walls.
He is the first known character to die in the anime.
In the first trailer for the Attack on Titan anime, he has black hair instead of blond.
Moses and Gordon share the same English voice actor.
